# terrible_telekom_mms_icinga_director_icinga_service_template (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `object_name` (String) Name of the service template.

### Optional

- `append` (Boolean) Do not overwrite the whole object but instead append the defined properties. Note - Appending to existing vars, imports or any other list/dict is not possible. You have to overwrite the complete list/dict. Note - Variables that are set by default will also be applied, even if not set.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `check_command` (String) Check command definition.
- `check_interval` (String) Your regular check interval.
- `check_period` (String) The name of a time period which determines when this object should be monitored. Not limited by default.
- `check_timeout` (String) Check command timeout in seconds. Overrides the CheckCommand's timeout attribute.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `disabled` (Boolean) Disabled objects will not be deployed.
- `enable_active_checks` (Boolean) Whether to actively check this object.
- `enable_event_handler` (Boolean) Whether to enable event handlers this object.
- `enable_flapping` (Boolean) Whether flap detection is enabled on this object.
- `enable_notifications` (Boolean) Whether to send notifications for this object.
- `enable_passive_checks` (Boolean) Whether to accept passive check results for this object.
- `enable_perfdata` (Boolean) Whether to process performance data provided by this object.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `event_command` (String) Event command for service which gets called on every check execution if one of these conditions matches The service is in a soft state The service state changes into a hard state The service state recovers from a soft or hard state to OK/Up
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `flapping_threshold_high` (String) Flapping upper bound in percent for a service to be considered flapping
- `flapping_threshold_low` (String) Flapping lower bound in percent for a service to be considered not flapping
- `groups` (String) Service groups that should be directly assigned to this service. Servicegroups can be useful for various reasons. They are helpful to provided service-type specific view in Icinga Web 2, either for custom dashboards or as an instrument to enforce restrictions. Service groups can be directly assigned to single services or to service templates.
- `icon_image` (String) An URL pointing to an icon for this object. Try "tux.png" for icons relative to public/img/icons or "cloud" (no extension) for items from the Icinga icon font
- `icon_image_alt` (String) Alternative text to be shown in case above icon is missing
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `imports` (String) Importable templates, add as many as you want. Please note that order matters when importing properties from multiple templates - last one wins.
- `max_check_attempts` (String) Defines after how many check attempts a new hard state is reached.
- `notes` (String) Additional notes for this object.
- `notes_url` (String) An URL pointing to additional notes for this object. Separate multiple urls like this "'http://url1' 'http://url2'". Maximum length is 255 characters.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `retry_interval` (String) Retry interval, will be applied after a state change unless the next hard state is reached.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Apply feature state.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `use_agent` (Boolean) Whether the check command for this service should be executed on the Icinga agent.
- `vars` (String) Custom properties of the service template.
- `volatile` (Boolean) Whether this check is volatile.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
